data.name: Bulbasaur
data.flavorText:
A strange seed was
planted on its
back at birth. The plant sprouts
and grows with
this POKéMON.

data.name: Ivysaur
data.flavorText:
When the bulb on
its back grows
large, it appears to lose the
ability to stand
on its hind legs.

data.name: Venusaur
data.flavorText:
The plant blooms
when it is
absorbing solar energy. It stays
on the move to
seek sunlight.

data.name: Charmander
data.flavorText:
Obviously prefers
hot places. When
it rains, steam is said to spout
from the tip of
its tail.

data.name: Charmeleon
data.flavorText:
When it swings
its burning tail,
it elevates the temperature to
unbearably high
levels.

data.name: Charizard
data.flavorText:
Spits fire that
is hot enough to
melt boulders. Known to cause
forest fires
unintentionally.

data.name: Squirtle
data.flavorText:
Shoots water at
prey while in the
water. Withdraws into
its shell when in
danger.

data.name: Wartortle
data.flavorText:
When tapped, this
POKéMON will pull
in its head, but its tail will
still stick out a
little bit.

data.name: Blastoise
data.flavorText:
It deliberately
makes itself heavy
so it can with­ stand the recoil
of the water jets
it fires.

data.name: Caterpie
data.flavorText:
It releases a stench from its red
antenna to repel enemies. It
grows by molting repeatedly.

data.name: Metapod
data.flavorText:
This POKéMON is
vulnerable to
attack while its shell is soft,
exposing its weak
and tender body.

data.name: Butterfree
data.flavorText:
In battle, it
flaps its wings
at high speed to release highly
toxic dust into
the air.

data.name: Weedle
data.flavorText:
Often found in
forests, eating
leaves. It has a sharp
venomous stinger
on its head.

data.name: Kakuna
data.flavorText:
Almost incapable
of moving, this
POKéMON can only harden its shell
to protect itself
from predators.

data.name: Beedrill
data.flavorText:
Flies at high
speed and attacks
using its large venomous stingers
on its forelegs
and tail.

data.name: Pidgey
data.flavorText:
A common sight in
forests and woods.
It flaps its wings at ground
level to kick up
blinding sand.

data.name: Pidgeotto
data.flavorText:
Very protective
of its sprawling
territorial area, this POKéMON will
fiercely peck at
any intruder.

data.name: Pidgeot
data.flavorText:
When hunting, it
skims the surface
of water at high speed to pick off
unwary prey such
as MAGIKARP.

data.name: Rattata
data.flavorText:
Bites anything
when it attacks.
Small and very quick, it is a
common sight in
many places.

data.name: Raticate
data.flavorText:
It uses its whis­
kers to maintain
its balance. It apparently
slows down if
they are cut off.

data.name: Spearow
data.flavorText:
Eats bugs in
grassy areas. It
has to flap its short wings at
high speed to
stay airborne.

data.name: Fearow
data.flavorText:
With its huge and
magnificent wings,
it can keep aloft without ever
having to land
for rest.

data.name: Ekans
data.flavorText:
Moves silently
and stealthily.
Eats the eggs of birds, such as
PIDGEY and
SPEAROW, whole.

data.name: Arbok
data.flavorText:
It is rumored that
the ferocious
warning markings on its belly
differ from area
to area.

data.name: Pikachu
data.flavorText:
When several of
these POKéMON
gather, their electricity could
build and cause
lightning storms.

data.name: Raichu
data.flavorText:
Its tail discharges electricity into
the ground, protecting it from
getting shocked.

data.name: Sandshrew
data.flavorText:
Burrows deep
underground in
arid locations far from water.
It only emerges
to hunt for food.

data.name: Sandslash
data.flavorText:
Curls up into a
spiny ball when
threatened. It can roll while
curled up to
attack or escape.

data.name: Nidoran♀
data.flavorText:
Although small,
its venomous
barbs render this POKéMON dangerous.
The female has
smaller horns.

data.name: Nidorina
data.flavorText:
The female's horn
develops slowly.
Prefers physical attacks such as
clawing and
biting.

data.name: Nidoqueen
data.flavorText:
Its hard scales
provide strong
protection. It uses its hefty
bulk to execute
powerful moves.

data.name: Nidoran♂
data.flavorText:
Stiffens its ears
to sense danger.
The larger its horns, the more
powerful its
secreted venom.

data.name: Nidorino
data.flavorText:
An aggressive
POKéMON that is
quick to attack. The horn on its
head secretes a
powerful venom.

data.name: Nidoking
data.flavorText:
One swing of its mighty tail can
snap a telephone pole as if it were
a matchstick.

data.name: Clefairy
data.flavorText:
Its magical and
cute appeal has
many admirers. It is rare and
found only in
certain areas.

data.name: Clefable
data.flavorText:
A timid fairy
POKéMON that is
rarely seen. It will run and hide
the moment it
senses people.

data.name: Vulpix
data.flavorText:
At the time of
birth, it has
just one tail. The tail splits
from its tip as
it grows older.

data.name: Ninetales
data.flavorText:
Very smart and
very vengeful.
Grabbing one of its many tails
could result in a
1000-year curse.

data.name: Jigglypuff
data.flavorText:
When its huge eyes
light up, it sings
a mysteriously soothing melody
that lulls its
enemies to sleep.

data.name: Wigglytuff
data.flavorText:
The body is soft
and rubbery. When
angered, it will suck in air and
inflate itself to
an enormous size.

data.name: Zubat
data.flavorText:
Forms colonies in
perpetually dark
places. Uses ultrasonic waves
to identify and
approach targets.

data.name: Golbat
data.flavorText:
Once it strikes,
it will not stop
draining energy from the victim
even if it gets
too heavy to fly.

data.name: Oddish
data.flavorText:
During the day,
it keeps its face
buried in the ground. At night,
it wanders around
sowing its seeds.

data.name: Gloom
data.flavorText:
It secretes a
sticky, drool-like
honey. Although sweet, it smells
too repulsive to
get very close.

data.name: Vileplume
data.flavorText:
It has the world's
largest petals.
With every step, the petals shake
out heavy clouds
of toxic pollen.

data.name: Paras
data.flavorText:
Burrows to suck
tree roots. The
mushrooms on its back grow by draw­
ing nutrients from
the bug host.

data.name: Parasect
data.flavorText:
A host-parasite
pair in which the
parasite mushroom has taken over the
host bug. Prefers
damp places.

data.name: Venonat
data.flavorText:
Lives in the
shadows of tall
trees where it eats insects. It
is attracted by
light at night.

data.name: Venomoth
data.flavorText:
The dust-like
scales covering
its wings are color coded to
indicate the kinds
of poison it has.

data.name: Diglett
data.flavorText:
Lives about one
yard underground
where it feeds on plant roots. It
sometimes appears
above ground.

data.name: Dugtrio
data.flavorText:
A team of DIGLETT
triplets.
It triggers huge earthquakes by
burrowing 60 miles
underground.

data.name: Meowth
data.flavorText:
Adores circular
objects. Wanders
the streets on a nightly basis to
look for dropped
loose change.

data.name: Persian
data.flavorText:
Although its fur
has many admirers,
it is tough to raise as a pet
because of its
fickle meanness.

data.name: Psyduck
data.flavorText:
While lulling its
enemies with its
vacant look, this wily POKéMON will
use psychokinetic
powers.

data.name: Golduck
data.flavorText:
Often seen swim­
ming elegantly by
lake shores. It is often mistaken
for the Japanese
monster, Kappa.

data.name: Mankey
data.flavorText:
Extremely quick to
anger. It could
be docile one moment then
thrashing away
the next instant.

data.name: Primeape
data.flavorText:
Always furious
and tenacious to
boot. It will not abandon chasing
its quarry until
it is caught.

data.name: Growlithe
data.flavorText:
Very protective
of its territory.
It will bark and bite to repel
intruders from
its space.

data.name: Arcanine
data.flavorText:
A POKéMON that
has been admired
since the past for its beauty.
It runs agilely
as if on wings.

data.name: Poliwag
data.flavorText:
Its newly grown
legs prevent it
from running. It appears to prefer
swimming than
trying to stand.

data.name: Poliwhirl
data.flavorText:
Capable of living
in or out of
water. When out of water, it
sweats to keep
its body slimy.

data.name: Poliwrath
data.flavorText:
An adept swimmer
at both the front
crawl and breast stroke. Easily
overtakes the best
human swimmers.

data.name: Abra
data.flavorText:
Using its ability
to read minds, it
will identify impending danger
and TELEPORT to
safety.

data.name: Kadabra
data.flavorText:
It emits special
alpha waves from
its body that induce headaches
just by being
close by.

data.name: Alakazam
data.flavorText:
Its brain can out­
perform a super­
computer. Its intelligence
quotient is said
to be 5,000.

data.name: Machop
data.flavorText:
Loves to build
its muscles.
It trains in all styles of martial
arts to become
even stronger.

data.name: Machoke
data.flavorText:
Its muscular body
is so powerful, it
must wear a power save belt to be
able to regulate
its motions.

data.name: Machamp
data.flavorText:
Using its heavy
muscles, it throws
powerful punches that can send the
victim clear over
the horizon.

data.name: Bellsprout
data.flavorText:
Even though its body is extremely
skinny, it is blindingly fast
when catching its prey.

data.name: Weepinbell
data.flavorText:
It spits out
POISONPOWDER to
immobilize the enemy and then
finishes it with
a spray of ACID.

data.name: Victreebel
data.flavorText:
Said to live in
huge colonies
deep in jungles, although no one
has ever returned
from there.

data.name: Tentacool
data.flavorText:
Drifts in shallow
seas. Anglers who
hook them by accident are
often punished by
its stinging acid.

data.name: Tentacruel
data.flavorText:
The tentacles are
normally kept
short. On hunts, they are extended
to ensnare and
immobilize prey.

data.name: Geodude
data.flavorText:
Found in fields
and mountains.
Mistaking them for boulders,
people often step
or trip on them.

data.name: Graveler
data.flavorText:
Rolls down slopes
to move. It rolls
over any obstacle without slowing
or changing its
direction.

data.name: Golem
data.flavorText:
Its boulder-like
body is extremely
hard. It can easily withstand
dynamite blasts
without damage.

data.name: Ponyta
data.flavorText:
Its hooves are 10
times harder than
diamonds. It can trample anything
completely flat
in little time.

data.name: Rapidash
data.flavorText:
Very competitive,
this POKéMON will
chase anything that moves fast
in the hopes of
racing it.

data.name: Slowpoke
data.flavorText:
Incredibly slow
and dopey. It
takes 5 seconds for it to feel
pain when under
attack.

data.name: Slowbro
data.flavorText:
The SHELLDER that
is latched onto
SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed
on the host's left
over scraps.

data.name: Magnemite
data.flavorText:
Uses anti-gravity
to stay suspended.
Appears without warning and uses
THUNDER WAVE and
similar moves.

data.name: Magneton
data.flavorText:
Formed by several
MAGNEMITEs linked
together. They frequently appear
when sunspots
flare up.

data.name: Farfetch’d
data.flavorText:
The sprig of
green onions it
holds is its weapon. It is
used much like a
metal sword.

data.name: Doduo
data.flavorText:
A bird that makes
up for its poor
flying with its fast foot speed.
Leaves giant
footprints.

data.name: Dodrio
data.flavorText:
Uses its three
brains to execute
complex plans. While two heads
sleep, one head
stays awake.

data.name: Seel
data.flavorText:
The protruding
horn on its head
is very hard. It is used for
bashing through
thick ice.

data.name: Dewgong
data.flavorText:
Stores thermal
energy in its
body. Swims at a steady 8 knots
even in intensely
cold waters.

data.name: Grimer
data.flavorText:
Appears in filthy
areas. Thrives by
sucking up polluted sludge
that is pumped
out of factories.

data.name: Muk
data.flavorText:
Thickly covered
with a filthy,
vile sludge. It is so toxic, even
its footprints
contain poison.

data.name: Shellder
data.flavorText:
Its hard shell
repels any kind
of attack. It is vulnerable
only when its
shell is open.

data.name: Cloyster
data.flavorText:
CLOYSTER that live
in seas with harsh
tidal currents grow large, sharp
spikes on their
shells.

data.name: Gastly
data.flavorText:
Almost invisible,
this gaseous
POKéMON cloaks the target and
puts it to sleep
without notice.

data.name: Haunter
data.flavorText:
Because of its
ability to slip
through block walls, it is said
to be from an­
other dimension.

data.name: Gengar
data.flavorText:
Under a full moon,
this POKéMON
likes to mimic the shadows of
people and laugh
at their fright.

data.name: Onix
data.flavorText:
As it grows, the
stone portions of
its body harden to become similar
to a diamond, but
colored black.

data.name: Drowzee
data.flavorText:
Puts enemies to
sleep then eats
their dreams. Occasionally gets
sick from eating
bad dreams.

data.name: Hypno
data.flavorText:
When it locks eyes
with an enemy, it
will use a mix of PSI moves such as
HYPNOSIS and
CONFUSION.

data.name: Krabby
data.flavorText:
Its pincers are
not only powerful
weapons, they are used for balance
when walking
sideways.

data.name: Kingler
data.flavorText:
The large pincer
has 10000 hp of
crushing power. However, its huge
size makes it
unwieldy to use.

data.name: Voltorb
data.flavorText:
Usually found in
power plants.
Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL,
they have zapped
many people.

data.name: Electrode
data.flavorText:
It stores electric
energy under very
high pressure. It often explodes
with little or no
provocation.

data.name: Exeggcute
data.flavorText:
Often mistaken
for eggs.
When disturbed, they quickly
gather and attack
in swarms.

data.name: Exeggutor
data.flavorText:
Legend has it that
on rare occasions,
one of its heads will drop off and
continue on as an
EXEGGCUTE.

data.name: Cubone
data.flavorText:
Because it never
removes its skull
helmet, no one has ever seen
this POKéMON's
real face.

data.name: Marowak
data.flavorText:
The bone it holds
is its key weapon.
It throws the bone skillfully
like a boomerang
to KO targets.

data.name: Hitmonlee
data.flavorText:
When in a hurry,
its legs lengthen
progressively. It runs smoothly
with extra long,
loping strides.

data.name: Hitmonchan
data.flavorText:
While apparently
doing nothing, it
fires punches in lightning fast
volleys that are
impossible to see.

data.name: Lickitung
data.flavorText:
Its tongue can be
extended like a
chameleon's. It leaves a tingling
sensation when it
licks enemies.

data.name: Koffing
data.flavorText:
Because it stores
several kinds of
toxic gases in its body, it is
prone to exploding
without warning.

data.name: Weezing
data.flavorText:
Where two kinds
of poison gases
meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a
WEEZING over many
years.

data.name: Rhyhorn
data.flavorText:
Its massive bones
are 1000 times
harder than human bones. It can
easily knock a
trailer flying.

data.name: Rhydon
data.flavorText:
Protected by an
armor-like hide,
it is capable of living in molten
lava of 3,600
degrees.

data.name: Chansey
data.flavorText:
A rare and elusive
POKéMON that is
said to bring happiness to those
who manage to get
it.

data.name: Tangela
data.flavorText:
The whole body is
swathed with wide
vines that are similar to sea­
weed. Its vines
shake as it walks.

data.name: Kangaskhan
data.flavorText:
The infant rarely
ventures out of
its mother's protective pouch
until it is 3
years old.

data.name: Horsea
data.flavorText:
Known to shoot
down flying bugs
with precision blasts of ink
from the surface
of the water.

data.name: Seadra
data.flavorText:
Capable of swim­
ming backwards by
rapidly flapping its wing-like
pectoral fins and
stout tail.

data.name: Goldeen
data.flavorText:
Its tail fin
billows like an
elegant ballroom dress, giving it
the nickname of
the Water Queen.

data.name: Seaking
data.flavorText:
In the autumn
spawning season,
they can be seen swimming power­
fully up rivers
and creeks.

data.name: Staryu
data.flavorText:
An enigmatic
POKéMON that can
effortlessly regenerate any
appendage it
loses in battle.

data.name: Starmie
data.flavorText:
Its central core
glows with the
seven colors of the rainbow. Some
people value the
core as a gem.

data.name: Mr. Mime
data.flavorText:
If interrupted
while it is
miming, it will slap around the
offender with its
broad hands.

data.name: Scyther
data.flavorText:
With ninja-like
agility and speed,
it can create the illusion that
there is more
than one.

data.name: Jynx
data.flavorText:
Its cries sound like human speech.
However, it is impossible to tell
what it is trying to say.

data.name: Electabuzz
data.flavorText:
Normally found
near power plants,
they can wander away and cause
major blackouts
in cities.

data.name: Magmar
data.flavorText:
Its body always
burns with an
orange glow that enables it to
hide perfectly
among flames.

data.name: Pinsir
data.flavorText:
If it fails to
crush the victim
in its pincers, it will swing it
around and toss
it hard.

data.name: Tauros
data.flavorText:
When it targets
an enemy, it
charges furiously while whipping its
body with its
long tails.

data.name: Magikarp
data.flavorText:
In the distant
past, it was
somewhat stronger than the horribly
weak descendants
that exist today.

data.name: Gyarados
data.flavorText:
Rarely seen in
the wild. Huge
and vicious, it is capable of
destroying entire
cities in a rage.

data.name: Lapras
data.flavorText:
A POKéMON that
has been over­
hunted almost to extinction. It
can ferry people
across the water.

data.name: Ditto
data.flavorText:
It can freely recombine its own cellular structure to
transform into other life-forms.

data.name: Eevee
data.flavorText:
Its genetic code
is irregular.
It may mutate if it is exposed to
radiation from
element STONEs.

data.name: Vaporeon
data.flavorText:
Lives close to
water. Its long
tail is ridged with a fin which
is often mistaken
for a mermaid's.

data.name: Jolteon
data.flavorText:
It accumulates
negative ions in
the atmosphere to blast out 10000-
volt lightning
bolts.

data.name: Flareon
data.flavorText:
When storing
thermal energy in
its body, its temperature could
soar to over 1600
degrees.

data.name: Porygon
data.flavorText:
A POKéMON that
consists entirely
of programming code. Capable of
moving freely in
cyberspace.

data.name: Omanyte
data.flavorText:
Although long
extinct, in rare
cases, it can be genetically
resurrected from
fossils.

data.name: Omastar
data.flavorText:
Apparently, it
cracked SHELLDER's
shell with its sharp fangs and
sucked out the
insides.

data.name: Kabuto
data.flavorText:
A POKéMON that
was resurrected
from a fossil found in what was
once the ocean
floor eons ago.

data.name: Kabutops
data.flavorText:
Its sleek shape is
perfect for swim­
ming. It slashes prey with its
claws and drains
the body fluids.

data.name: Aerodactyl
data.flavorText:
A ferocious, pre­
historic POKéMON
that goes for the enemy's throat
with its serrated
saw-like fangs.

data.name: Snorlax
data.flavorText:
Very lazy. Just
eats and sleeps.
As its rotund bulk builds, it
becomes steadily
more slothful.

data.name: Articuno
data.flavorText:
A legendary bird
POKéMON that is
said to appear to doomed people who
are lost in icy
mountains.

data.name: Zapdos
data.flavorText:
A legendary bird
POKéMON that is
said to appear from clouds while
dropping enormous
lightning bolts.

data.name: Moltres
data.flavorText:
It is said to be the legendary bird Pokémon of fire.
Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flare
of flames.

data.name: Dratini
data.flavorText:
Long considered a
mythical POKéMON
until recently when a small
colony was found
living underwater.

data.name: Dragonair
data.flavorText:
A mystical POKéMON
that exudes a
gentle aura. Has the ability
to change climate
conditions.

data.name: Dragonite
data.flavorText:
An extremely
rarely seen
marine POKéMON. Its intelligence
is said to match
that of humans.

data.name: Mewtwo
data.flavorText:
It was created by
a scientist after
years of horrific gene splicing and
DNA engineering
experiments.

data.name: Mew
data.flavorText:
So rare that it
is still said to
be a mirage by many experts. Only
a few people have
seen it worldwide.
